title: Charm Air Freshener Tropical Delight 240ml x12 Pack – Long Lasting Tropical Scent, Eliminates Odors, Refreshes Home, Office & Car, Instant Burst Spray for Lasting Freshness, Air Care Solution
features: PACK CONTENTS: Set of six 240ml air freshener spray bottles in refreshing Tropical Delight fragrance for comprehensive home freshening needs
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for multiple environments including homes, offices, and vehicles, providing consistent freshness wherever needed
INSTANT ACTION: Quick-burst spray mechanism delivers immediate fragrance dispersion for rapid odour elimination and room refreshment
LONG-LASTING PERFORMANCE: Extended fragrance longevity ensures sustained fresh tropical scent throughout the space
COMPLETE SOLUTION: Effectively eliminates unwanted odours while infusing spaces with a delightful tropical aroma for a more pleasant environment
description: Transform your space with Charm Air Freshener Tropical Delight, a premium air care solution that brings the essence of a tropical paradise into your environment. This convenient pack of six 240ml spray bottles delivers an instant burst of refreshing tropical fragrance that lingers in the air, effectively neutralising unwanted odours. Perfect for use throughout your home, office, or vehicle, each spray releases a carefully balanced blend of tropical notes that create an inviting atmosphere. The generous 240ml size ensures long-lasting performance, whilst the easy-to-use spray mechanism allows for precise application wherever needed. Whether you're freshening up your living room before guests arrive, creating a pleasant work environment, or maintaining a fresh-smelling car interior, this versatile air freshener delivers consistent results. Keep multiple bottles handy in different locations for immediate access to lasting freshness whenever you need it.
